resume_text:
PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Software Engineer II — Meridian Technologies, Austin, TX (2021–Present)
• Designed and implemented a real-time event processing pipeline using Python, Kafka, and PostgreSQL, handling 50K+ events per minute with 99.95% uptime.
• Led migration of a monolithic Django application to a microservices architecture (FastAPI + Docker + Kubernetes), reducing deployment time from 45 minutes to under 5.
• Mentored 2 junior engineers through code reviews and weekly 1:1s, resulting in both being promoted within 18 months.
• Collaborated with product and design to ship a customer-facing analytics dashboard (React + D3.js) used by 3,000+ daily active users.

Junior Software Engineer — Crestline Software, Denver, CO (2019–2021)
• Built and maintained REST APIs serving 10M+ requests/day for a SaaS invoicing platform.
• Reduced average API response time by 35% through query optimization and Redis caching.
• Wrote comprehensive integration test suites achieving 92% code coverage.

EDUCATION
B.S. Computer Science, Minor in Mathematics (2019)

SKILLS
Python, JavaScript/TypeScript, React, Django, FastAPI, PostgreSQL, Redis, Docker, Kubernetes, AWS (EC2, S3, Lambda), Git, CI/CD pipelines, Agile/Scrum

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Marketing Manager — Halcyon Brands, Chicago, IL (2022–Present)
• Own end-to-end strategy for a $3.2M annual digital marketing budget across paid search, social, email, and display channels.
• Launched a content marketing program that grew organic blog traffic from 15K to 85K monthly sessions within 14 months, generating 1,200+ marketing-qualified leads per quarter.
• Redesigned the email nurture program (12-touch sequence), improving click-through rates by 40% and conversion to demo by 22%.
• Manage a team of 5 (2 content writers, 1 designer, 1 social media specialist, 1 paid media analyst).

Marketing Coordinator — BrightPath Consumer Goods, Minneapolis, MN (2018–2022)
• Planned and executed 20+ product launch campaigns across retail and e-commerce channels.
• Managed influencer partnerships (15–30 creators per campaign) with an average engagement rate of 4.8%.
• Built Salesforce dashboards to track campaign attribution, enabling leadership to reallocate $400K toward higher-performing channels.

EDUCATION
MBA, Marketing Concentration (2018)
B.A. Communications (2016)

SKILLS
Google Ads, Meta Ads Manager, HubSpot, Salesforce, Google Analytics 4, Tableau, SEO/SEM, A/B testing, copywriting, brand strategy, team leadership

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Data Analyst — Foresight Analytics Group, Seattle, WA (2022–Present)
• Built automated reporting infrastructure in Python (pandas + Airflow) that replaced 30+ hours/week of manual Excel work across 4 departments.
• Designed and maintained interactive Tableau dashboards tracking KPIs for a $120M product line, used weekly by C-suite leadership.
• Conducted cohort analysis and churn modeling that identified $2.4M in at-risk annual revenue, enabling the retention team to intervene and recover 60% of flagged accounts.
• Partnered with engineering to instrument event tracking (Segment + BigQuery), improving data completeness from 72% to 98%.

Business Intelligence Intern — Lakeshore Financial Services, Portland, OR (Summer 2021)
• Wrote SQL queries and built Power BI reports for the compliance team, reducing quarterly audit preparation time by 50%.
• Cleaned and standardized 3 years of transaction data (1.2M rows) for a migration to Snowflake.

EDUCATION
B.S. Statistics, Minor in Economics (2022)

SKILLS
SQL (PostgreSQL, BigQuery, Snowflake), Python (pandas, scikit-learn, matplotlib), Tableau, Power BI, Airflow, dbt, Excel, A/B testing, statistical modeling, data storytelling

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Registered Nurse, ICU — Summit Medical Center, Nashville, TN (2021–Present)
• Provide direct patient care for 4–6 critically ill patients per shift in a 32-bed medical/surgical ICU with a 94% patient satisfaction score.
• Serve as charge nurse 2–3 shifts per week, coordinating staffing, bed assignments, and rapid response activations for the unit.
• Precepted 12 new graduate nurses through a 16-week orientation program, with 100% retention at the 1-year mark.
• Led a unit-based quality improvement project on central line-associated bloodstream infections (CLABSI), contributing to a 40% reduction over 6 months.

Registered Nurse, Medical-Surgical — Riverbend Community Hospital, Knoxville, TN (2018–2021)
• Managed patient loads of 5–7 on a 40-bed med-surg unit, including post-operative and chronic disease patients.
• Trained in IV therapy, wound care, and telemetry monitoring.
• Served on the hospital's Falls Prevention Committee, helping implement a protocol that reduced patient falls by 28%.

EDUCATION
BSN — Bachelor of Science in Nursing (2018)

CERTIFICATIONS
ACLS, PALS, CCRN (Critical Care Registered Nurse), BLS Instructor

SKILLS
Critical care nursing, ventilator management, hemodynamic monitoring, Epic EMR, patient education, charge nurse leadership, evidence-based practice, interdisciplinary collaboration

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Financial Analyst — Westbrook Capital Partners, New York, NY (2022–Present)
• Build and maintain 3-statement financial models and DCF valuations for a portfolio of 8 mid-market companies ($50M–$300M revenue).
• Prepare monthly board reporting packages synthesizing P&L variance analysis, cash flow forecasts, and KPI dashboards for senior leadership.
• Identified $1.8M in annual cost-saving opportunities through vendor consolidation analysis and headcount modeling.
• Automate recurring reports using Python and VBA, saving the team approximately 15 hours per month.

Financial Analyst — Ridgeline Manufacturing Corp., Cleveland, OH (2020–2022)
• Owned the annual budgeting process for a $75M business unit, coordinating inputs from 6 department heads.
• Developed scenario models for capital expenditure decisions, supporting $12M in approved investments.
• Conducted pricing analysis for 200+ SKUs, recommending adjustments that improved gross margin by 1.4 percentage points.

EDUCATION
B.S. Finance, Minor in Accounting (2020)
CFA Level II Candidate

SKILLS
Financial modeling (DCF, LBO, comps), Excel (advanced), Python, SQL, SAP, Bloomberg Terminal, PowerPoint, variance analysis, budgeting & forecasting, GAAP

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

AP English Literature Teacher — Westfield Preparatory Academy, Raleigh, NC (2019–Present)
• Teach 5 sections of AP English Literature and Composition (130+ students annually), with 87% of AP exam takers scoring 3 or higher over the past 3 years.
• Developed a year-long curriculum integrating close reading, Socratic seminars, and analytical writing, aligned to College Board standards and state requirements.
• Sponsor the school literary magazine (The Westfield Review) and coach the varsity debate team to consecutive regional finals appearances.
• Serve on the school's Curriculum & Instruction Committee, leading the adoption of a new writing portfolio assessment system.

English Teacher — Oakmont Middle School, Durham, NC (2016–2019)
• Taught 7th and 8th grade English Language Arts to diverse learners, including ELL and IEP students.
• Implemented a reading workshop model that increased average Lexile scores by 120 points over the academic year.
• Organized an annual creative writing showcase for 300+ students and families.

EDUCATION
M.Ed. Secondary Education — English (2016)
B.A. English Literature (2014)

CERTIFICATIONS
State-licensed in Secondary English (6–12), AP-certified instructor, Google Educator Level 2

SKILLS
Curriculum design, differentiated instruction, formative & summative assessment, classroom management, Socratic method, educational technology (Canvas, Google Classroom), student mentorship, parent communication

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Mechanical Engineer — Apex Industrial Design, San Jose, CA (2021–Present)
• Lead the mechanical design of consumer electronics enclosures and thermal management systems, from concept through mass production (volumes of 500K+ units/year).
• Redesigned a flagship product's internal bracket assembly, reducing part count from 14 to 8 and cutting manufacturing cost by 18% ($1.2M annual savings).
• Conducted FEA thermal and structural simulations (ANSYS) to validate designs prior to prototyping, reducing physical prototype iterations by 40%.
• Manage relationships with 3 contract manufacturers in Shenzhen, including DFM reviews, first article inspections, and production quality audits.
• Co-inventor on 2 utility patents for novel latching mechanisms.

Design Engineer — Foundry Mechanical Systems, Detroit, MI (2019–2021)
• Designed HVAC ducting and fluid handling components for commercial buildings using SolidWorks and AutoCAD.
• Created GD&T drawings and tolerance stack-ups for machined and injection-molded parts.
• Supported prototype builds and testing for thermal performance validation.

EDUCATION
B.S. Mechanical Engineering (2019)

SKILLS
SolidWorks, AutoCAD, ANSYS (FEA/CFD), GD&T, injection molding DFM, sheet metal design, 3D printing, thermal management, tolerance analysis, Jira, technical documentation

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

HR Generalist — Cornerstone Health Systems, Philadelphia, PA (2022–Present)
• Manage full-cycle recruiting for 60+ positions annually across clinical, administrative, and IT departments, maintaining an average time-to-fill of 34 days.
• Administer benefits enrollment and employee relations for a workforce of 800+, serving as the primary point of contact for leave of absence, accommodations, and workplace concerns.
• Led the implementation of a new ATS (Greenhouse), reducing recruiter administrative workload by 25% and improving candidate experience scores by 15%.
• Conduct new hire orientation and 30/60/90-day check-ins, contributing to a first-year retention rate of 88%.

HR Coordinator — Atlas Logistics Group, Baltimore, MD (2020–2022)
• Processed biweekly payroll for 350 employees using ADP Workforce Now, with zero payroll errors over 18 months.
• Maintained employee records and ensured compliance with FMLA, ADA, and state labor laws.
• Coordinated company-wide engagement surveys (85% participation rate) and presented findings to leadership.

EDUCATION
B.A. Human Resources Management (2020)
SHRM-CP Certified

SKILLS
Full-cycle recruiting, employee relations, HRIS (Workday, ADP, BambooHR), ATS (Greenhouse, Lever), benefits administration, onboarding, employment law (FMLA/ADA/EEO), performance management, conflict resolution, data-driven HR analytics

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Graphic Designer — Luminary Creative Studio, Brooklyn, NY (2021–Present)
• Lead visual design for 8–10 concurrent client projects spanning brand identity, packaging, digital campaigns, and environmental graphics.
• Spearheaded a comprehensive rebrand for a DTC skincare company (logo, packaging, website, social templates), contributing to a 35% increase in brand recognition as measured by post-launch survey.
• Create motion graphics and short-form video content (After Effects, Premiere Pro) for social media campaigns averaging 2M+ impressions per month.
• Mentor 2 junior designers, conducting weekly portfolio reviews and skill-building sessions.

Graphic Designer — Redline Agency, Los Angeles, CA (2018–2021)
• Designed print and digital collateral for 15+ clients across tech, retail, and hospitality sectors.
• Produced pitch decks, trade show graphics, and email templates, maintaining brand consistency across all touchpoints.
• Won an AIGA local award for a restaurant identity system (logo, menu, signage, website).

EDUCATION
B.F.A. Graphic Design (2018)

SKILLS
Adobe Creative Suite (Photoshop, Illustrator, InDesign, After Effects, Premiere Pro), Figma, Sketch, motion graphics, typography, brand identity, packaging design, print production, UX/UI fundamentals, creative direction

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Account Executive — Vantage SaaS Solutions, Boston, MA (2022–Present)
• Manage a territory of 90+ mid-market accounts generating $4.2M in annual recurring revenue.
• Exceeded annual quota by 128% in FY2023 and 115% in FY2024, ranking in the top 5% of the 60-person sales organization.
• Develop and execute multi-threaded account strategies using Salesforce, Outreach, and LinkedIn Sales Navigator.
• Closed the company's largest-ever mid-market deal ($380K ACV) through a 6-month enterprise-style sales cycle involving 4 stakeholders.

Account Executive — Pinnacle Cloud Services, Atlanta, GA (2020–2022)
• Sourced and closed 45+ new business deals in the first 18 months through a combination of cold outreach (200+ emails/week) and inbound lead follow-up.
• Built a repeatable demo-to-close playbook that was adopted by the broader sales team, improving team win rate from 18% to 26%.
• Promoted from SDR to AE after 8 months based on pipeline generation performance.

EDUCATION
B.A. Business Administration (2020)

SKILLS
Salesforce, Outreach, LinkedIn Sales Navigator, Gong, consultative selling, solution selling, cold outreach, pipeline management, contract negotiation, forecasting, cross-functional collaboration, presentation skills

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Project Manager — Ironclad Construction & Engineering, Phoenix, AZ (2021–Present)
• Manage a portfolio of 4–6 concurrent commercial construction and tenant improvement projects with combined budgets of $8M–$15M.
• Delivered 12 projects on time and within budget over the past 3 years, with an average client satisfaction score of 4.7/5.0.
• Coordinate cross-functional teams of 15–25 (architects, subcontractors, engineers, inspectors) through all phases from pre-construction through closeout.
• Implemented a standardized risk register and change order tracking process that reduced budget overruns by 30% across the department.

Project Coordinator — Bridgepoint Technology, Dallas, TX (2018–2021)
• Supported delivery of 10+ software implementation projects for enterprise clients using Agile and Waterfall methodologies.
• Maintained project schedules in MS Project and Jira, coordinating sprint planning, daily standups, and retrospectives.
• Created status reports and executive dashboards that improved stakeholder visibility into project health.

EDUCATION
B.S. Industrial Engineering (2018)
PMP Certified (Project Management Professional)

SKILLS
MS Project, Jira, Smartsheet, Procore, Agile/Scrum, Waterfall, risk management, budgeting & cost control, stakeholder management, vendor negotiation, team leadership, Gantt charts, earned value management

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Senior Accountant — Clearview Financial Group, Charlotte, NC (2022–Present)
• Manage month-end and year-end close processes for a multi-entity organization with $200M+ in consolidated revenue, ensuring all deadlines are met within 5 business days.
• Prepare consolidated financial statements (income statement, balance sheet, cash flow) in compliance with US GAAP.
• Identified and resolved a $480K inter-company reconciliation discrepancy that had persisted for 2 quarters.
• Supervise 2 staff accountants, reviewing journal entries, account reconciliations, and supporting schedules.

Staff Accountant — Hargrove & Associates CPAs, Richmond, VA (2020–2022)
• Prepared individual and corporate tax returns (Form 1040, 1120, 1120-S, 1065) for 80+ clients during each tax season.
• Assisted with financial statement audits for small and mid-size businesses, including fieldwork, testing, and workpaper documentation.
• Performed bank reconciliations, fixed asset tracking, and accounts payable/receivable for 15 monthly clients.

EDUCATION
B.S. Accounting (2020)
CPA Licensed (Virginia)

SKILLS
US GAAP, financial reporting, tax preparation (individual & corporate), audit support, general ledger management, QuickBooks, NetSuite, SAP, Excel (pivot tables, VLOOKUP, macros), month-end close, inter-company accounting, fixed assets

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Postdoctoral Research Associate — Institute for Genomic Medicine, San Diego, CA (2022–Present)
• Lead a research program investigating CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing strategies for rare pediatric genetic disorders, with 2 first-author publications in Nature Genetics and Cell Reports.
• Secured $220K in independent postdoctoral fellowship funding (NIH F32 + institutional supplement).
• Mentor 3 graduate students and 2 undergraduate research assistants, providing training in molecular cloning, cell culture, and bioinformatics.
• Developed a custom bioinformatics pipeline (Python, R, Snakemake) for analyzing whole-genome sequencing data, reducing analysis turnaround from 2 weeks to 3 days.

Graduate Research Assistant — Department of Molecular Biology, University Research Center (2017–2022)
• Published 6 peer-reviewed papers (2 first-author) on epigenetic regulation of gene expression in developmental biology.
• Designed and executed experiments using CRISPR, RT-qPCR, Western blot, ChIP-seq, and RNA-seq.
• Presented findings at 4 national conferences including ASHG and AACR.

EDUCATION
Ph.D. Molecular Biology (2022)
B.S. Biochemistry, Summa Cum Laude (2017)

SKILLS
CRISPR-Cas9 gene editing, next-generation sequencing, bioinformatics (Python, R, Snakemake, Nextflow), cell culture, molecular cloning, ChIP-seq, RNA-seq, flow cytometry, scientific writing, grant writing, mentorship

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Operations Manager — Summit Distribution Partners, Indianapolis, IN (2021–Present)
• Oversee daily operations of a 250,000 sq ft distribution center processing 12,000+ orders per day with a 99.6% order accuracy rate.
• Manage a team of 45 warehouse associates, 4 shift supervisors, and 2 inventory specialists across 2 shifts.
• Implemented lean manufacturing principles (5S, Kaizen, value stream mapping) that reduced pick-and-pack cycle time by 22% and warehouse waste by $340K annually.
• Negotiated contracts with 8 freight carriers, achieving a 12% reduction in per-unit shipping costs ($680K annual savings).
• Led the rollout of a new WMS (Manhattan Associates), including UAT testing, staff training, and go-live support.

Assistant Operations Manager — Atlas Fulfillment Services, Columbus, OH (2018–2021)
• Coordinated inbound receiving, inventory management, and outbound shipping for a 3PL serving 25+ e-commerce clients.
• Developed KPI dashboards (units per hour, error rate, on-time shipping) that improved team accountability and throughput by 15%.
• Managed vendor relationships for packaging supplies, MHE maintenance, and temp staffing.

EDUCATION
B.S. Supply Chain Management (2018)

SKILLS
Warehouse management systems (Manhattan, SAP WM), lean/Six Sigma (Green Belt), inventory control, demand planning, vendor management, P&L ownership, labor planning, fleet management, continuous improvement, MS Excel, Power BI

PROFESSIONAL EXPERIENCE

Customer Support Team Lead — Nimbus Software Inc., San Francisco, CA (2022–Present)
• Lead a team of 10 support agents handling 2,500+ tickets per month across email, chat, and phone channels for a B2B SaaS platform with 4,000+ customers.
• Maintain a team CSAT score of 96% and first-response time under 2 hours, consistently exceeding SLA targets.
• Developed a comprehensive internal knowledge base (200+ articles) that reduced average ticket resolution time by 25% and deflected 18% of incoming tickets to self-service.
• Created onboarding training curriculum and SOPs that reduced new agent ramp time from 8 weeks to 5 weeks.
• Collaborate with Product and Engineering to triage and escalate bugs, providing weekly voice-of-customer reports that influenced 3 major feature releases.

Customer Support Specialist — Beacon Analytics, Denver, CO (2019–2022)
• Resolved 50+ customer inquiries per day via Zendesk, maintaining a personal CSAT score of 98%.
• Identified a recurring billing integration issue affecting 200+ accounts. Documented the root cause and worked with engineering to ship a fix within 2 weeks.
• Wrote 40+ help center articles and recorded 15 tutorial videos, contributing to a 30% reduction in repetitive tickets.

EDUCATION
B.A. Communications, Minor in Business (2019)

SKILLS
Zendesk, Intercom, Salesforce Service Cloud, Jira, Confluence, knowledge base management, team coaching, SLA management, escalation handling, customer empathy, data analysis, process improvement, cross-functional collaboration
